title: Explain Help Menu
short_answer: HELP MENU shows the main help options available.
text: HELP MENU should be the first command when the user wants to know what the assistant can explain from the HELP section.

title: Explain Help Explain On
short_answer: HELP EXPLAIN ON makes EXPLAIN questions go to HELP.
text: Use this when working on the HELP system. It makes phrases like EXPLAIN MEMORY or EXPLAIN LLM search the HELP files first.

title: Explain Help Explain Off
short_answer: HELP EXPLAIN OFF lets EXPLAIN return to normal question flow.
text: Use this when you want EXPLAIN to stop being captured by HELP. After this, EXPLAIN why this failed can go to normal LLM or context flow again.

title: Explain Memory Example
short_answer: EXPLAIN MEMORY should describe the memory block.
text: This is the basic example for checking whether HELP can explain the app's memory and context engine.

title: Explain LLM Example
short_answer: EXPLAIN LLM should describe the model block.
text: This example checks whether HELP can explain the LLM integration area, including models, service, prompts, and provider connection.

title: Explain Runtime Example
short_answer: EXPLAIN RUNTIME should describe live working files.
text: This example checks whether HELP can explain where the app writes state, logs, output, queues, and latest runtime records.

title: Explain Scripts Example
short_answer: EXPLAIN SCRIPTS should describe runnable helper scripts.
text: This example checks whether HELP can explain how scripts are used to start, test, clean, or diagnose the assistant app.

title: Explain Settings Example
short_answer: EXPLAIN SETTINGS should describe app configuration.
text: This example checks whether HELP can explain the settings folder, including app settings, play settings, audio settings, TTS settings, and LLM settings.

title: Explain Troubleshooting Example
short_answer: HELP TROUBLESHOOTING should give debug guidance.
text: This example checks whether HELP can guide the user toward what to inspect when something does not work.

title: Explain Qdrant Example
short_answer: EXPLAIN QDRANT should describe semantic memory search support.
text: This example checks whether HELP can explain Qdrant as an index/search backend, not as the whole memory architecture.
